Mbarara Connect

Explore Mbarara

Top Attractions

Lake Mburo National Park

Experience wildlife safaris, zebras, antelopes, boat rides, and unforgettable nature adventures.

Igongo Cultural Centre

Discover Ankole heritage, traditional cuisine, museums, and cultural experiences.

Mbarara Main Street

Enjoy vibrant city life, local shopping, cafes, entertainment, and nightlife.

Local Markets

Explore fresh produce, handmade crafts, local foods, and community experiences.

About Mbarara

Mbarara is one of Uganda’s fastest-growing cities known for tourism, culture, hospitality, and education. The city connects travelers to wildlife adventures, cultural experiences, and local business opportunities.

What Visitors Say

"Mbarara is peaceful, beautiful, and welcoming. I loved the culture and food."

- Sarah

"Lake Mburo was an unforgettable experience. Highly recommended!"

- James

"The people are friendly and the city is very clean and modern."

- Anita
